user_query: Read the most recently modified OneDrive file and check if any company names in it are Salesforce accounts.

plan.query: Read the most recently modified OneDrive file and check if any company names in it are Salesforce accounts.
plan.reasoning: The first step is to read the most recently modified file from OneDrive using the graph agent. The second step involves checking the company names found in that file against the accounts in Salesforce using the salesforce agent. These tasks can be executed in sequence as the second step relies on the output from the first step.

steps.task: Retrieve the most recently modified file from OneDrive.
Check if any company names from the file retrieved in step 1 are present in Salesforce accounts.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results of step 2 to identify which company names from the OneDrive file correspond to Salesforce accounts.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve the most recently modified file from OneDrive.
